zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry FitzHugh 5th Baron of Ravensworth於1429年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，他的父親William FitzHugh31歲，母親Lady Margaret Willoughby35歲。他於1452年與Alice Neville在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年6月8日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry FitzHugh 5th Baron of Ravensworth于1429年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，他的父亲William FitzHugh31岁，母亲Lady Margaret Willoughby35岁。他于1452年与Alice Neville在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年6月8日在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry FitzHugh 5th Baron of Ravensworth was born in 1429, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, William FitzHugh, was 31 and his mother, Lady Margaret Willoughby, was 35. He married Alice Neville in 1452, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 8 June 1472, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry FitzHugh 5th Baron of Ravensworth est né en 1429, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William FitzHugh, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Willoughby, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alice Neville en 1452, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1452 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1472 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Neville nel 1452, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry FitzHugh 5th Baron of Ravensworthが1429年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父William FitzHughは31歳，母Lady Margaret Willoughbyは35歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlice Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年6月8日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry FitzHugh 5th Baron of Ravensworth(이)가 1429년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzHugh(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Willoughby(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Alice Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 6월 8일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry FitzHugh 5th Baron of Ravensworth родился в 1429 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William FitzHugh было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Willoughby, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Neville в 1452 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 8 июня 1472 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Neville en 1452, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas.
